remarks: Enjoy comfortable living at its best with ALL utilities included except cable, internet, phone and liability insurance. The main level features a spacious, modern open-concept layout that seamlessly combines the living room, dining area and newer kitchen. The second level offers two comfortable bedrooms with 1 full bath and 1 half bath. The windows throughout fill the space with much natural light, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere. Coin-operated washer & dryer - No pets allowed. Cul-de-sac location and close to Pemberwick Park, shops and Highways. Applicants must provide strong credit and a solid employment history.
